title: Simple Blueprints
description: A simple schematic mod for building structures.
body:
# Simple Blueprints

A simple Minecraft client mod that provides tools for copying and building structures for both creative and survival.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e517cadabd2ba760ef02425f62819aed24e3a1_0.webp)

## Common Use Cases

- Pasting a survival build into a creative world
- Building something from a creative world in survival
- See a preview of a build placed in the world before committing to building it
- Sharing a blueprint with multiple players for collaborative builds

## Features

- Copy/paste structures
- Rotate/mirror structures
- Display transparent structures in the world for easy building
- Import/export blueprints
- List the number of items required to build a structure
- Show individual layers of a structure
- Multiple blueprints can be used at a time
- Chat command suggestions for coordinates

## Tools

The toolbar can be opened by pressing the `B` key. This replaces your hotbar with various blueprint tools.

![toolbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66ed41503389b1edce17e7d6eb035b443d9968b.png)

|            Icon            | Description                                        |
|:--------------------------:|----------------------------------------------------|
|   ![select](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe3b0bb8498a4bb4f0555e4d37adf18f8ddff6f.png)   | Makes a selection                                  |
|   ![place](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab944483c9549007410c6ce04a9280ac991d4a70.png)    | Places a blueprint                                 |
|    ![move](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e2a3f45dea9d39a2aaa047b10b888d8b981d715.png)    | Moves a selection                                  |
|   ![resize](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ea5231dbb749e89b05bc278616fba2bd99eb206.png)   | Resizes a selection                                |
|   ![rotate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2facffcd597bd25fac8b5e0cfb1f8893dacb7e4b.png)   | Rotate/mirror a blueprint                          |
|   ![delete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f0724a48a5b4d8b7faf6bcd5131882f9b516330.png)   | Deletes blocks in a selection                      |
| ![clipboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec1ff9f1c7e20245f49f68f5df39b80b7fdf1e6.png)  | Copy/paste blocks in a selection                   |
| ![visibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb70fa5b447288817c494134291407bf465593d6.png) | Change visibility of blueprints                    |
|   ![layers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f04ff770d4f67068fb81aed2b01c991441e922e.png)   | Change visibility of blueprint layers              |
| ![item list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82dc120d9b3b75b69324bf11283d400e3d937845.png)  | View the items required for the selected blueprint |
|   ![slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3101dbea81d6d7edb39324b2a365baa1535b425a.png)    | Change/edit blueprint slots                        |
